pr.title: TrigramHash + XSA + TTT on thwu1 SOTA stack - val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Combines trigram hash embeddings, Exclusive Self-Attention in final layers, EMA, and test-time SGD on validation tokens atop thwu1's stack.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Runs deterministic test-time SGD over validation tokens before evaluation with frozen lower layers and restores weights afterward.
techniques: XSA removing self-value bias in final layers
Test-time SGD on validation tokens with EMA
